query:
-- Count customers that SHOULD be retail_offering (have a Site Bundle billing item)
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT customerExternalId) as should_be_retail
FROM billing_items
WHERE description LIKE '%Site Bundle%'
AND customerExternalId IS NOT NULL AND customerExternalId != '';
